expertAssessments.rationale: The two changed AI routing/evidence surfaces were verified on Vercel production in clean new-chat sessions. P19c delta ranking and P21 empty trend-threshold evidence both returned deterministic monitoring-metric-trend answers.
GitLab release pipeline succeeded, production version API and Cloud Run health both report v8.12.65, and free-tier guardrails remain intact.
Regression coverage includes a new deterministic unit test plus production Playwright MCP transcript evidence for both changed behavior paths.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.12.65 production deploy and targeted P19c/P21 Playwright MCP recheck; effective usage 17.9292 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no billed overage observed.

artifacts.label: v8.12.65 P19c/P21 Playwright MCP transcript evidence

completedImprovements.title: Trend ranking queries sort by increase delta instead of current value
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.65 production query '메모리 상승률 가장 높은 서버 5개' returned monitoring-metric-trend and ordered cache-redis-dc1-03 +7.5%p, api-was-dc1-01 +5.3%p, web-nginx-dc1-01 +3.4%p.

completedImprovements.title: Trend plus threshold filters return deterministic trend evidence even when no servers match
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.65 production query '디스크 70% 이상이면서 24h 증가한 서버 알려줘' returned monitoring-metric-trend with condition disk >=70%, 24h increase, and deterministic no-match result.

notes: Local gates before release: targeted current-metrics evidence test PASS (74 tests), ai-engine type-check PASS, ai-engine test PASS (145 files / 1587 tests), root test:contract PASS (24 tests), npm run lint PASS, git diff --check PASS.
v8.12.64 production initially reproduced P21 fallback to realtime threshold answer when the filtered trend result was empty. v8.12.65 fixes that by keeping empty trend-filter results deterministic.
Vercel usage after production QA: effective=17.9292 USD, billed=0.0000 USD.
Cloud Run free-tier guardrails after deploy: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00571-jzx.
